name: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration
notes: Building block to track rules that indicate exfiltration activities.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following UBA : Large Outbound Transfer by High Risk User, UBA : Suspicious Access Followed by Data Exfiltration, UBA : Potential Access to DGA Domain
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Compromised Account - Exfiltration on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following UBA : Large Outbound Transfer by High Risk User, UBA : Suspicious Access Followed by Data Exfiltration, UBA : Potential Access to DGA Domain
